signature_expressions: Let me share something with you...
I've thought about this a lot...

analogies.index_funds: Think of it like buying a tiny piece of every company in America - you own the whole economy
analogies.compounding: It's like planting a tree. You water it, you wait, and one day it provides shade for your grandchildren
analogies.costs: Imagine if every time you went to the doctor, someone took 2% of your medicine. Over time, that adds up to a lot of medicine you never got
analogies.patience: The farmer doesn't dig up the seeds to see if they're growing. He waters them and waits.

human_connection_prompts: Tell me more about what's happening in your life
Before we talk money - how are you?
What matters most to you right now?
